paragraphs.text: ACT 7, SCENE 1
THE SOWING AND REAPING CONSEQUENCES!
Locations: Everywhere Around The World Time Frame: 2024 Onwards

LO! BEHOLD! At 12 noon, the sky outside suddenly turned pitch black without warning! Torrential downpours accompanied by fierce, howling winds swept across the land, uprooting trees and tearing rooftops from houses as rising floodwaters surged through the streets. In the midst of this cataclysmic storm, a young boy stood frozen, watching in horror as his home collapsed before his eyes.

"Ah, Ma! Ah Pa! Oh my God! What is happening to me, my home, and all my loved ones?" The boy cried out in utter shock, disbelief, and overwhelming grief. Raising his tear-streaked face to the darkened sky, he screamed, "Oh God! Why have you allowed this calamity to befall my family and our home? Oh my God! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Lightning, strike me down and take my life too!"

As if in response to his desperate plea, a bolt of lightning suddenly struck the boy and the trees around him, followed by a deafening clap of thunder. The boy collapsed, unconscious, joining the fallen trees on the ground.

A nearby woman, witnessing the boy's collapse, quickly called for medical help. Upon the medics' arrival, the boy was rushed to the nearest hospital. But even as they fought to save him, the boy's breath began to fade. He saw himself leaving his body, being sucked into a vortex that brought him to the very entrance of the centre of the earth. There, he stood before the gate of THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, where two horned demons guarded the way. The demons, with a menacing grip, dragged the boy to kneel before THE JUDGE who sat on THE GREAT WHITE THRONE.

Trembling with fear, the boy dared to lift his eyes toward the blinding light that emanated from THE THRONE. As his vision adjusted, he gasped in shock and awe. "Oh, it's you - SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID! How can it be that both of you sit on THE GREAT WHITE THRONE judging the living and the dead? Where is JESUS?" he asked, his voice barely a whisper.

AARON K DAVID, his gaze piercing, spoke with the authority of one who embodies divine justice. "Do you remember, many years ago, when SHEKINAIH and I came to your village and your church to deliver THE TRINITY'S MESSAGE to the entire congregation? You and your family mocked US, spreading false rumours and slandering OUR names, all because of your unbelief when WE declared WHO WE ARE - "THE TRINITY'S REPRESENTATIVES."

The weight of these words hung heavy in the air, and the boy's heart sank as the full gravity of his past actions dawned on him. "The fate that has befallen your family and you this day is the direct consequence of what you have sown. Now, you are reaping the harvest of your mockery and disbelief. Do not be deceived, THE TRINITY is not to be mocked. Whatever a man sows, that shall he also reap!"

In an instant, the boy's mind was flooded with memories of his past sins. His face grew pale, and a terror unlike any he had ever known gripped his soul. He began to beat his chest in deep regret, crying out, "Oh, I didn't know that SHEKINAIH and YOU truly are THE CHERUBIM OF GLORY, the guardians of THE ARK OF THE COVENANT and THE TREE OF LIFE, standing before THE TRINITY as THE ANGEL OF HIS PRESENCE. Now that I have seen YOU on THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, judging on behalf of THE TRINITY, I am filled with profound sorrow and remorse. I have sinned greatly before THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID! Have mercy on me, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID! Have mercy on me, Son
of David!"

Desperation choked his words as he pleaded, "Give me another chance, and I promise to devote my life to YOUR will, to make my life count for YOUR kingdom and glory forever and ever, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, THE ANGEL OF HIS PRESENCE!"

AARON K DAVID, seated on THE THRONE in a lower realm, turned to SHEKINAIH, who sat on THE GREAT WHITE GLORIOUS THRONE in the higher realm. SHEKINAIH's eyes, like piercing beams of light, bore into the boy's very soul. In a voice that echoed with divine authority, SHEKINAIH declared, "YOUR REQUEST IS GRANTED! BUT REMEMBER THIS DAY, WHAT YOU HAVE PROMISED - THAT YOU WILL USE THIS SECOND CHANCE TO DO THE TRINITY'S WILL AND NOT YOUR OWN WILLFUL WILL ANYMORE, FOR ALL THE REMAINING DAYS OF YOUR LIFE, OR ELSE...!"

The boy, now trembling uncontrollably, nodded frantically, "Yes, I understand! If I fail to keep my promise, what has happened to me today will be nothing compared to what will come! I swear on my life, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID!" He pounded his fist on the ground, weeping bitterly as he vowed to make his second chance count.

SHEKINAIH then handed AARON K DAVID a JADE VASE, containing the boy's soul and spirit. With the approval of SHEKINAIH, AARON K DAVID released the boy's soul and spirit, sending it back to his earthly body. Together, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID blew the horn in unison, commanding the boy's soul and spirit to return to his lifeless form.

Back in the hospital, the doctor who had pronounced the boy dead was preparing to move the body to the mortuary. But just as he was about to cover the boy's face, the lifeless eyes suddenly snapped open. The boy began to move, removing the white cloth that covered him.
The doctor, his mouth agape, stammered, "But...you were dead!
Breathless! How is this possible?"
The boy, rubbing his eyes, replied, "Yes, I was dead, but THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID have given me a second chance -

to live and to fulfil THEIR will on earth." The doctors and nurses, utterly stunned, could only stare in disbelief as the boy continued, "Indeed, it was THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID who brought me back. I will live my life to fulfil my destiny in THEM."

News of this miraculous event spread like wildfire through the hospital, igniting a wave of curiosity and awe. Whispers filled the halls as everyone asked the same question: "Who are SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, who possess such power to defy death and command a soul's return?"
